input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 1.1.5 tests reference org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedActorExtension, and TypedProps; these classes are absent from the 2.0.0-M1 artifact, so coverage must avoid preserving those legacy tests.
Pekko documentation recommends pekko-testkit for test utilities, but meaningful coverage of the target pekko-actor artifact is reachable without adding it.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is required: org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1 resolves with only scala-library and com.typesafe:config runtime dependencies, and normal use is in-process ActorSystem/Props/classic actor APIs with no Docker service, environment variable, or system property prerequisite. The observed failure is from removed legacy TypedActor APIs, not missing setup.
